name: verified-algebra-workflow
new_string: See `references/state4-db-mine-2026-07-13.md` only as the superseded first-pass negative audit; its claim that `Q/state_H_fast` were irrecoverable is no longer current. See `references/locked-historical-fts-fit-recovery-2026-07-14.md` for the authoritative recovery, hashes, rerun receipts, and fit-versus-derivation firewall. See `references/fts-claim-method-reproduction.md` for the still-useful generic recipe when some other frame/generator is genuinely missing: rebuild with a documented self-chosen frame and label the result method-soundness, not certification.
old_string: See `references/state4-db-mine-2026-07-13.md` for the CLOSED verdict on mining `state-4.db`: frame `Q` never checkpointed, `state_H_fast` unrecoverable, `locked_jordan_data.json` is a circular reconstruction that fails `extract_mixing`, and the only forward move is re-derivation with `Q` checkpointed. See `references/fts-claim-method-reproduction.md` for the method-reproduction recipe when the frame/generator are missing: rebuild from the paper with a documented self-chosen frame, label the fro as method-soundness NOT certification.
